title: Java Concurrency: Threads, Lifecycle, and the Efficiency Trap
snippet: If you want to understand Java concurrency, stop thinking about code and start thinking about logistics. Before tackling the 1 Billion Row Challenge, we need to understand what threads actually are, how they work, and why "just add more threads" is almost always the wrong answer.
